title: UMBC Capstones and Applied Research - Factual Source
content:
Academic context from career overview:
- M.S. Data Science at UMBC (2023-2025) with advanced coursework in ML, NLP, deep learning, distributed systems, cloud, and statistical learning.

Capstone and project themes listed in source material:
- RAG-powered podcast generation pipeline with OCR, retrieval orchestration, and multi-voice synthesis.
- Forest fire detection using Sentinel-2 imagery with CNN-based modeling and remote-sensing indices.
- Financial crisis analysis workflow using sentiment modeling and simulation-driven risk analysis.

Career relevance of these projects:
- Reinforced the bridge between formal theory and production implementation.
- Strengthened end-to-end skills across data preparation, modeling, evaluation, and operationalization.
- Provided practical foundations that map directly to later GenAI and production ML work.
